entry.title: IDC W15P7T10DC007 (P00152) awarded to GENERAL DYNAMICS MISSION SYSTEMS, INC, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: ADMINISTRATIVE MODIFICATION TO CORRECT PAYMENT OFFICE

entry.title: IDC W15P7T10DC007 (P00153) awarded to GENERAL DYNAMICS MISSION SYSTEMS, INC, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THIS MODIFICATION IS TO ESTABLISH PRICING FOR THE NEXT GENERATION POINT OF PRESENCE AND SOLDIER NETWORK ENTERPRISE A-KIT (NEXGEN POP&SNE A-KIT) AS A RESULT OF THE INCORPORATION OF ECP E0PC007-088R3 VIA MODIFICATION P00146.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

entry.title: IDC W15P7T10DC007 (P00155) awarded to GENERAL DYNAMICS MISSION SYSTEMS, INC, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: W4GV USA HQ COMM ELECT CMD

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: TO INCORPORATE ENGINEERING CHANGE PROPOSAL (ECP) E0PC007-106R1 ENTITLED "TACTICAL RELAY-TOWER (TR-T) JBOSS CATCH UP" INTO CONTRACT W15P7T-10-D-C007.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC W15P7T10DC007 (P00156) awarded to GENERAL DYNAMICS MISSION SYSTEMS, INC, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: AVOCENT KVM HAS GONE END OF LIFE AND WILL BE REMOVED FROM THE TACTICAL COMMUNICATIONS NODE CONFIGURATION ITEM AND JUNIPER SERIAL CABLE HAS GONE END OF LIFE AND IS BEING REPLACED WITH SAME FORM/FIT/FUNCTION CABLE.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC W15P7T10DC007 (P00157) awarded to GENERAL DYNAMICS MISSION SYSTEMS, INC, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THIS ECP FOR THE MOBILE ADHOC ROUTER (MAR) BYPASS IMPLEMENTATION, THE EMBEDDED MAR WILL BE RECONFIGURED AS A LAYER 2 SWITCH DISABLING THE LAYER 3 ROUTING FUNCTIONS OF THE MAR. THIS ECP IS SPECIFIC TO SOFTWARE CHANGES ONLY

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC W15P7T10DC007 (P00158) awarded to GENERAL DYNAMICS MISSION SYSTEMS, INC, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION (P00158) IS TO INCORPORATE ADMINISTRATIVE ENGINEERING CHANGE PROPOSAL (ECP) E0PC007-107 ENTITLED "WAVE CLIENT INTO INC 2 PROGRAM OF RECORD (POR)" INTO BASE CONTRACT W15P7T-10-D-C007.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC W15P7T10DC007 (P00159) awarded to GENERAL DYNAMICS MISSION SYSTEMS, INC, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: TO EXTEND THE ORDERING PERIOD FOR THE INDEFINITE DELIVERY INDEFINITE QUANTITY (IDIQ) CONTRACT W15P7T-10-D-C007 BY THREE YEARS AND SIX MONTHS (3.5 YEARS). THE ORDERING PERIOD FOR W15P7T-10-D-C007 IS HEREBY EXTENDED FROM 23 JULY 2018 TO 23 JANUARY 2022 AT AN ESTIMATED AMOUNT OF $900M.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC W15P7T10DC007 (P00160) awarded to GENERAL DYNAMICS MISSION SYSTEMS, INC, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION (P00160 UNDER THE BASIC CONTRACT, W15P7T-10-D-C007 IS TO INCORPORATE THE RANGE PRICING BASED ON THE DEFINITIZATION OF THE MERCURY XR6 ENGINEERING CHANGE PROPOSAL, EOPC007-154R1.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC W15P7T10DC007 (P00161) awarded to GENERAL DYNAMICS MISSION SYSTEMS, INC, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
TO INCORPORATE NEGOTIATED RANGE PRICING FOR ECP E0PC007-108, "THEMIS HD EOL" ON TO CONTRACT. ECP E0PC007 WAS PREVIOUSLY INCORPORATED ON TO CONTRACT VIA MODIFICATION P00163, IN AN EFFORT TO AVOID PRODUCTION DELAY. THIS MODIFICATION EFFECTS DELIVERY ORDERS 0081, 0082, 0098, 0099, AND 0100.
IDIQ CONTRACT W15P7T10DC007 IS FOR EQUIPMENT AND SUPPORT SERVICES REQUIRED FOR THE LRIP OF WIN-T INCREMENT 2. THE GOAL IS TO DEMONSTRATE SYSTEM PERFORMANCE, FUNCTIONALITY, PROVE-OUT PRODUCTION PROCESSES AND RAMP-UP PRODUCTION TO SUPPORT FULL RATE PRODUCTION REQUIREMENTS.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
